texto: Technology ventures can succeed with very little investment, unlike many other industries. A lot of the big Internet players like Google or Yahoo were started by a couple of guys with computers. Microsoft was started in Bill Gates' garage.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jonathan Raymond: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Technology ventures can succeed with very little investment, unlike many other industries. A lot …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, technology, internet pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de internet e google.

texto: Banks will fee you to death. If you bounce a check, the bank has a policy to re-post the check three more times to see if it will be paid. If it continues to bounce they charge a $30 overdraft every time. So, one bounced check will rack up $90 for the bank.

frase_original: Banks will fee you to death. If you bounce a check, the bank has a policy to re-post the check three more times to see if it will be paid. If it continues to bounce they charge a $30 overdraft every time. So, one bounced check will rack up $90 for the bank.
